name: Feature Request

labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

**Is this related to a problem?**
<!-- A clear description of the limitation or pain point. -->

**Proposed solution**
<!-- Describe what you'd like to see added or changed. -->

**Affected files**
<!-- Which skill file(s) would need to change? e.g., components.md, workflow.md -->

**Alternatives considered**
<!-- Any workarounds or alternative approaches you've thought of. -->

**Additional context**
<!-- Mockups, examples, links, or references. -->
